title: PB-LobbyCore
body:
**PB-LobbyCore** is a plugin that adds various useful functions designed primarily for a Lobby server. You can support the plugin by making a donation through this link: [https://paypal.me/PabloHernandez601](https://paypal.me/PabloHernandez601)
Join to my Support Discord Server

## 📤 Installation Guide This plugin is compatible from version 1.18x to 1.21x. Download the latest version of the plugin and upload it to your server's plugins folder. Once uploaded, restart the server for the changes to take effect. ![Plugin Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30e7f7e4c48e90db9ecb6ebdcd31834e33837f44.png) ## 📸 Screenshots: ![messages.yml File](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3036dcecf6a6b6446ebad18f7e042056e7434116.png) Here you can see the default **messages.yml** file. **[UPDATED - 13/09/2025]** ![modules.yml File](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d3d35752cfa2412a6bf824c4b570165bb530c6b.png) Here you can see the default **modules.yml** file. ## SpigotMC: [https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/pb-lobbycore.128342/](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/pb-lobbycore.128342/)
